label: Seasonal Specials
description: Calendar-based weirdness for holidays, patch days, and cursed weekdays.

quotes.text:
If anything weird happens today,
I will be acting surprised professionally.

The office is feeling a little haunted.
Could be AD again.

Cold outside.
Fans still screaming inside.

Weekend objective:
turn one small homelab idea into six medium mistakes.

I am technically online.
Let's not stress the definition.
